name: ɄniTether
description: ɄniTether (ɄSDT) is an ERC-20 stablecoin issued exclusively to the Blockchain-Vetted Charity Fund (BV-CF). The destination address is hard-coded into the contract as an immutable variable, making it impossible for any actor to redirect newly minted tokens. The contract enforces a 1,000,000,000 hard cap and emits on-chain events for every mint and burn — providing a complete, publicly auditable issuance history.
